Class Times

Tue Mornings — Boorley Green

Thu Evenings — Botley

Send Us a Message

Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you soon.

Note about equipment donations: If you wish to donate equipment for beginners, kindly ensure all items are clean, functional, and in good condition. We are unable to collect donations — you will need to drop them off at one of our lace classes.

Donate Equipment

We gratefully accept donations of lace-making equipment for our beginners. This helps new students try the craft before investing in their own supplies.

What we're looking for:

  • Lace pillows in good condition
  • Bobbins (wooden or plastic)
  • Pins and pin cushions
  • Threads and patterns

Important: Please ensure all items are clean, functional, and in good condition prior to donation. Items sourced directly from dusty lofts may not be suitable. Contact us to arrange drop-off at one of our classes.

Hedge End Bobbin Lacemakers

Join our vibrant community and explore the beautiful art of bobbin lace-making. All skill levels welcome.
